message:
feat(db): add DbConnGuard RAII wrapper for explicit SQLite connection cleanup

Bare drop(conn) silently discards SQLite close errors, which can mask
WAL corruption or lock-release failures. Introduce close_db_conn() for
explicit error-logged closing, and DbConnGuard (with Deref/DerefMut)
that calls it automatically on drop. Every short-lived connection site
will be migrated to use these in a follow-up commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
